label: Programs

seo.metaTitle: Go-to-Market Programs for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch faster, sell smarter, and retain more customers with Hostopia's go-to-market programs. Channel sales, partner marketing, project management, service management, and multilingual support — all in your brand.

hero.headline: Your Success Is Our Business
hero.subheadline: We embed with your teams — marketing, sales, operations, and support — so you get to market faster, sell more effectively, and keep customers longer.

intro: Hostopia's Programs are purpose-built enablement services that extend your team's capabilities — from go-to-market planning through ongoing customer support. Each program is fully white-labeled, tracked, and delivered in your brand.

programCards.title: Channel as a Service
programCards.description: A turnkey sales channel, running inbound and outbound campaigns in your brand. Fully tracked. Fully yours.

programCards.title: Partner Marketing
programCards.description: Demand generation, MDF management, and campaign execution. Your marketing team, extended.

programCards.title: Project Management
programCards.description: Dedicated PMs for deployments, migrations, and custom implementations. On time. On scope.

programCards.title: Service Management
programCards.description: A named contact who owns your account, runs QBRs, pulls in experts, and keeps everything on track.

programCards.title: Support
programCards.description: Multilingual, multi-channel, 24/7 technical support in your brand. Level 1 through Level 3.
